action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 21 CatBoost YetiRank training succeeded (val IC 0.0652, early stopping at 81 iterations). Analysis: YetiRank directly optimizes ranking, should improve rank IC and potentially Pearson IC. Need to submit eval with catboost_model.cbm to measure test IC. Decision: ensure predict.py is complete (re-write to eliminate truncation), then submit eval with checkpoint_path='.' (where .cbm lives). Remaining time ~1.05h, this will measure progress.
